title: avellinia scabriuscula
intro: Avellinia scabriuscula, also known as the "Milk Tree," is a plant species native to South America, belonging to the Fabaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including the ability to stimulate milk production in lactating women. Avellinia scabriuscula has been known to promote digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of Avellinia scabriuscula include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
